name: @block-agent/app-im_proxy
description: im_proxy BlockApp: projects an external IM service into agent context (chat window + push→wake→ingest). The ws/fetch client is isolated here; @block-agent/core never imports it.
$exports_note: exports point at .ts SOURCE (no build). Importers use '@block-agent/app-im_proxy/manifest.js'; NodeNext resolves it via the workspace symlink.

blockAgent.summary: 把外部 IM 服务投影成 agent 上下文里的聊天块。
